messages.author: Simon [muzi ᴡᴏʀᴋꜱ]
messages.text: FYI the 5sec hold is a Meshtastic firmware defined function. The button press is passed through at all times. If it hits 8sec, then the DFU is initiated via a double reset pulse to the nRF (edited)
messages.content_html: FYI the 5sec hold is a Meshtastic firmware defined function. The button press is passed through at all times. If it hits 8sec, then the DFU is initiated via a double reset pulse to the nRF (edited)
messages.reply_html:
loather
Holding the button for 5 seconds does not hard reset the device and I don't know why, because that should be a baked in hardware function

messages.author: tadeck
messages.text: Not really. Scrolling and scrolling, getting some info that does not provide definitive answer... Based on the comments I read what I said is still the case: some version is there, but not ready. From the problems it currently has, is the lack of support for turning it off using buttons - which is I believe the problem with the firmware for this board, since it is not adapted to R1 Neo. So long story short, either I need to 'scroll more' and maybe eventually find some other answer (which would be very unlikely, since development is in progress), or the answer is as I originally mentioned: not ready and not approved yet.
messages.content_html: Not really. Scrolling and scrolling, getting some info that does not provide definitive answer... Device: Muzi R1 Neo Firmware: v1.15.0 Phone: Any Phone OS: Any Issue User manual states Long press (5 seconds): Shutdown device The device does not power down. Workaround Enter DFU mode, per user m...

Device: Muzi R1 Neo Firmware: v1.15.0 Phone: Any Phone OS: Any Issue Turning off audio notifications in the Meshcore app has no effect, audio notifications are still played. Expected Behavior User ...
